rationale: Educ. Code §29.161 governs the school readiness certification system for prekindergarten and early childhood programs. It contains no provisions tied to homestead exemption amounts or property tax revenue, so the proposed increase is not in conflict.
quote: The State Center for Early Childhood Development, in conjunction with the P-16 Council established under Section 61.076, shall develop and adopt a school readiness certification system for use in certifying the effectiveness of prekindergarten programs
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified. Statute concerns early childhood program certification, not property tax or homestead exemption mechanics.
